pattern: Leviathan prompt-repetition EXACT TWIN + Many-Tier Instruction Hierarchy + Wallace Instruction Hierarchy

deviations: R388 Sumerian cuneiform template-restriction adjacency; different mechanism (template vs repetition)
honest_audit.borderline_notes: AINU-INAU-TIER-STACK is an explicit small extension of Leviathan K=2 to K∈{1..5} as priority encoding. Not novel; recombines two existing mechanisms (prompt-repetition + priority-tier instruction hierarchy).
